first_visit.line: Hey! I'm Casey — your frontend learning guide. Pick any case to start.
Welcome to The Frontend Casebook. No fluff, just real patterns.

return_low.line: Good to see you back. {completed} down, more to explore.
Pick up where you left off — or try something new.

return_streak.line: {streak} cases in a row — you're on a streak!
Look at you go — {streak} cases completed.

return_high.line: {completed} cases done. The advanced ones are waiting.

zero_results.line: Nothing in that track yet — try removing the filter.
Hmm, no matches. Try a different category?

start.line: Let's dig into this one. Read through the story first.
Start with the hook — then try the demo yourself.

completed.line: Nice — you finished this one. On to the next?

visit.line: 779 real-world engineering articles. Filter by topic or company.
